title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
